text:
(1) The department, upon suspending or revoking a license, shall require that such license be surrendered to the department.

(2) At the end of the period of suspension, the licensee may apply for and receive a replacement license upon payment of a fee. The department shall set the fee in accordance with section 42-2-114.5 (2). The department shall transfer the fee to the state treasurer, who shall credit it to the Colorado DRIVES vehicle services account created in section 42-1-211 (2).
markdown:
## Title 42
#### Article 2. Drivers’ Licenses
##### § 42-2-133 — Surrender and return of license

(1) The department, upon suspending or revoking a license, shall require that such license be surrendered to the department.

(2) At the end of the period of suspension, the licensee may apply for and receive a replacement license upon payment of a fee. The department shall set the fee in accordance with section 42-2-114.5 (2). The department shall transfer the fee to the state treasurer, who shall credit it to the Colorado DRIVES vehicle services account created in section 42-1-211 (2).

subsections.text: The department, upon suspending or revoking a license, shall require that such license be surrendered to the department.

At the end of the period of suspension, the licensee may apply for and receive a replacement license upon payment of a fee. The department shall set the fee in accordance with section 42-2-114.5 (2). The department shall transfer the fee to the state treasurer, who shall credit it to the Colorado DRIVES vehicle services account created in section 42-1-211 (2).
